free_text: Measurements of the prompt neutron spectra of minor
actinides - Fast neutron induced fission of 241Am and
- B-501A  (2 in diam x 2 in, Tres=1.1 ns, Ethr=0.1 MeV)
- B-501A  (2 in diam x 1 in, Tres=0.8 ns, Ethr=0.1 MeV)
For fission fragment detection and also as
flight paths: 100 cm for Am, 60 cm for Cm
Neutron and fragment were detected in
- differences in flight paths for different fission
This work was supported financially by Japan, and
performed under the contract to the International
M.M. Entry compiled by N.Otsuka (IAEA NDS)
Report ISTC-1828-01,2004 was not available for checking
